## ❗ Description

A clear and concise description of the bug.

## 🔁 Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Scroll down to '...'
4. See error

## 📱 Environment

- Device: [e.g. iPhone 14]
- OS: [e.g. iOS 17.4]
- App version: [e.g. 1.0.3]

## ✅ Expected Behavior

What did you expect to happen?

## 🧾 Additional Context (Optional)

Add screenshots, logs, or anything else that helps explain the problem.
